mapper.select: SELECT TRIM(s.SERVICE_ID) AS serviceId, s.SERVICE_NAME AS serviceName, s.SERVICE_DESC AS serviceDesc, s.CLASS_NAME AS className, s.METHOD_NAME AS methodName, s.SERVICE_TYPE AS serviceType, s.BIZ_GROUP_ID AS bizGroupId, s.ORG_ID AS orgId, s.IO_TYPE AS ioType, s.WORK_SPACE_ID AS workSpaceId, s.TRX_ID AS trxId, s.USE_YN AS useYn, s.PRE_PROCESS_APP_ID AS preProcessAppId, s.POST_PROCESS_APP_ID AS postProcessAppId, s.TIME_CHECK_YN AS timeCheckYn, s.START_TIME AS startTime, s.END_TIME AS endTime, s.BIZDAY_SERVICE_YN AS bizdayServiceYn, s.BIZDAY_SERVICE_START_TIME AS bizdayStartTime, s.BIZDAY_SERVICE_END_TIME AS bizdayEndTime, s.SATURDAY_SERVICE_YN AS saturdayServiceYn, s.SATURDAY_SERVICE_START_TIME AS saturdayStartTime, s.SATURDAY_SERVICE_END_TIME AS saturdayEndTime, s.HOLIDAY_SERVICE_YN AS holidayServiceYn, s.HOLIDAY_SERVICE_START_TIME AS holidayStartTime, s.HOLIDAY_SERVICE_END_TIME AS holidayEndTime, s.LOGIN_ONLY_YN AS loginOnlyYn, s.SECURE_SIGN_YN AS secureSignYn, s.REQ_CHANNEL_CODE AS reqChannelCode, s.BANK_STATUS_CHECK_YN AS bankStatusCheckYn, s.BANK_CODE_FIELD AS bankCodeField, s.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, TRIM(s.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_SERVICE s WHERE s.SERVICE_ID = #{serviceId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_SERVICE WHERE SERVICE_ID = #{serviceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_SERVICE ( SERVICE_ID, SERVICE_NAME, SERVICE_DESC, CLASS_NAME, METHOD_NAME, SERVICE_TYPE, BIZ_GROUP_ID, ORG_ID, IO_TYPE, WORK_SPACE_ID, TRX_ID, USE_YN, PRE_PROCESS_APP_ID, POST_PROCESS_APP_ID, TIME_CHECK_YN, START_TIME, END_TIME, BIZDAY_SERVICE_YN, BIZDAY_SERVICE_START_TIME, BIZDAY_SERVICE_END_TIME, SATURDAY_SERVICE_YN, SATURDAY_SERVICE_START_TIME, SATURDAY_SERVICE_END_TIME, HOLIDAY_SERVICE_YN, HOLIDAY_SERVICE_START_TIME, HOLIDAY_SERVICE_END_TIME, LOGIN_ONLY_YN, SECURE_SIGN_YN, REQ_CHANNEL_CODE, BANK_STATUS_CHECK_YN, BANK_CODE_FIELD, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{dto.serviceId}, #{dto.serviceName}, #{dto.serviceDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.className, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.methodName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.serviceType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.bizGroupId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.orgId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.ioType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.workSpaceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.trxId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.useYn}, #{dto.preProcessAppId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.postProcessAppId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.timeCheckYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.startTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.endTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.bizdayServiceYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.bizdayStartTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.bizdayEndTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.saturdayServiceYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.saturdayStartTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.saturdayEndTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.holidayServiceYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.holidayStartTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.holidayEndTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.loginOnlyYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.secureSignYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.reqChannelCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.bankStatusCheckYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.bankCodeField, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_SERVICE SET SERVICE_NAME = #{dto.serviceName}, SERVICE_DESC = #{dto.serviceDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CLASS_NAME = #{dto.className, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, METHOD_NAME = #{dto.methodName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SERVICE_TYPE = #{dto.serviceType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BIZ_GROUP_ID = #{dto.bizGroupId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_ID = #{dto.orgId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IO_TYPE = #{dto.ioType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_SPACE_ID = #{dto.workSpaceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRX_ID = #{dto.trxId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_YN = #{dto.useYn}, PRE_PROCESS_APP_ID = #{dto.preProcessAppId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POST_PROCESS_APP_ID = #{dto.postProcessAppId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TIME_CHECK_YN = #{dto.timeCheckYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_TIME = #{dto.startTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, END_TIME = #{dto.endTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BIZDAY_SERVICE_YN = #{dto.bizdayServiceYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BIZDAY_SERVICE_START_TIME = #{dto.bizdayStartTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BIZDAY_SERVICE_END_TIME = #{dto.bizdayEndTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SATURDAY_SERVICE_YN = #{dto.saturdayServiceYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SATURDAY_SERVICE_START_TIME = #{dto.saturdayStartTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SATURDAY_SERVICE_END_TIME = #{dto.saturdayEndTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HOLIDAY_SERVICE_YN = #{dto.holidayServiceYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HOLIDAY_SERVICE_START_TIME = #{dto.holidayStartTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HOLIDAY_SERVICE_END_TIME = #{dto.holidayEndTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LOGIN_ONLY_YN = #{dto.loginOnlyYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SECURE_SIGN_YN = #{dto.secureSignYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REQ_CHANNEL_CODE = #{dto.reqChannelCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_STATUS_CHECK_YN = #{dto.bankStatusCheckYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_CODE_FIELD = #{dto.bankCodeField, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId} WHERE SERVICE_ID = #{serviceId}

sql.if: AND s.SERVICE_ID IN ( SELECT sr.SERVICE_ID FROM FWK_SERVICE_RELATION sr JOIN FWK_COMPONENT c ON sr.COMPONENT_ID = c.COMPONENT_ID WHERE c.COMPONENT_ID LIKE '%' || #{componentId} || '%' )
AND s.SERVICE_ID IN ( SELECT sr.SERVICE_ID FROM FWK_SERVICE_RELATION sr JOIN FWK_COMPONENT c ON sr.COMPONENT_ID = c.COMPONENT_ID WHERE c.COMPONENT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{componentName} || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_WORK_SPACE
AND WORK_SPACE_ID LIKE '%' || #{workSpaceId} || '%'
AND WORK_SPACE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{workSpaceName} || '%'
